decoder_heading: Protecting your privacy is important to us
ident_heading: Protecting your privacy is important to us
heading_content_part: Protecting your privacy is important to us. We hope the following statement will help you understand how        ScreenMaster deals with the personal identifiable information ('PII') you may occasionally provide to us        via Internet (the'Google Play'Platform).

decoder_heading: Generally, we do not collect any PII from you when you download our Android applications
ident_heading: Generally, we do not collect any PII from you when you download our Android applications
heading_content_part: Generally, we do not collect any PII from you when you download our Android applications. To be specific, we do        not require the consumers to get registered before downloading the application, nor do we keep track of the        consumers' visits of our application, we even don't have a Server to store such PII.ScreenMaster uses Facebook as ads provider. Facebook wants to show ads that are relevant to you. For more        information, please check https://m.facebook.com/ads/ad_choices.

decoder_heading: The only situation we may get access to your PII is when you personally decide to email us your feedback or to provide us with a bug report

heading_content_part: The only situation we may get access to your PII is when you personally decide to email us your feedback or to        provide us with a bug report. The PII we may get from you in that situation are strictly limited to your name,        email address and your survey response only.In above situation, we guarantee that your PII will only be used for contacting you and improving our services.

decoder_heading: We will never use such information (e.g. your name and email address) for any other purposes

heading_content_part: We will never use such information (e.g. your name and email address) for any other purposes, such as to further        market our pr

If you have concern about your PII being misused, or if you want further        information about our privacy policy and what it means, please feel free to email us at blossgraph@gmail.com, we        will endeavor to provide clear answers to your questions in a timely manner.
